subject: [PATCH 01/13] mm: add softleaf_to_pmd() and convert existing callers

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called `softleaf_to_pmd()` which is the PMD counterpart to `softleaf_to_pte()`. It completes the symmetry of the softleaf abstraction for page table leaf entries. The existing callers of `swp_entry_to_pmd()` are converted to use `softleaf_to_pmd()` instead, keeping the feature patches focused on new functionality rather than refactoring code. This change is necessary for upcoming PMD swap entry support which needs to construct PMD entries from swap entries.
